sampleReviews.text: I went to the branch and handed the bill to the employee, Taher. After fifteen minutes, I asked him about the bill, and he said he didn't know anything about it. I asked several other employees, but no one addressed the issue. Then I went to the security guard, who retrieved it for me from the same employee, Taher. I hope I didn't hold Taher accountable. The security guard deserves a reward for his excellent treatment of everyone; he was cheerful, polite, and respectful. I hope the company will

sampleReviews.text:
I hope the working hours will be adjusted. I ordered two egg sandwiches through the app, and it told me they would be ready in 15 minutes. When I arrived at the restaurant, the waiter told me my order would take another 40 minutes!

Seriously? 40 minutes? Even if I ordered a stuffed lamb, it wouldn't be like this! They should adhere to the time specified in the app.

I'm sure if they continue like this, they'll lose more and more customers, and that's exactly what's happening.

sampleReviews.text: To branch management: 1) Make sure the cashier writes the orders accurately. I ordered a sandwich WITHOUT sauce, and after waiting 15 to 20 minutes, I received it WITH sauce, and then waited another 15 minutes to receive a replacement sandwich WITHOUT sauce. 2) The screen displaying the order numbers reads: "NOW SERVING". Myself and other customers thought this meant these orders are now ready and kept asking for our orders. Please change the title to: "NOW PREPARING", and separately display the
sampleReviews.justification: I ordered a sandwich WITHOUT sauce, and after waiting 15 to 20 minutes, I received it WITH sauce, and then waited another 15 minutes to receive a replacement sandwich WITHOUT sauce.

sampleReviews.text: To branch management: 1) Make sure the cashier writes the orders accurately. Myself and other customers thought this meant these orders are now ready and kept asking for our orders. Please change the title to: "NOW PREPARING", and separately display the
sampleReviews.justification: Please change the title to: "NOW PREPARING", and separately display the numbers of the orders ready for pick-up and entitle it: "READY" so that customers do not gather near the counter asking about their orders unnecessarily.

sampleReviews.text:
Finally visited the much-hyped Saudi brand Al-Baik - something I’ve wanted to try since childhood. Was it worth the hype? Honestly, my expectations fell a bit short.
The fish spicy fillets were the highlight for me ♥️ absolutely delicious and truly lived up to the hype. However, the chicken breast meal and spicy burger were quite average and didn’t stand out. Also, a bit of a disappointment at the Clock Tower Al-Baik (P3 level) doesn’t serve their famous broast chicken, which was something we we
sampleReviews.justification: The fish spicy fillets were the highlight for me ♥️ absolutely delicious and truly lived up to the hype.
